events.label: assistant
events.text: Identified the defect: transmitter mounted above the process taps on a liquid-service line, which inverts the required orientation (transmitter should sit below the taps so impulse lines slope continuously down, keeping the sensing line liquid-full and letting any vapor migrate back to the process). This traps air/vapor pockets and biases the reading — a fail at rough-in per API RP 551 guidance. Written to `/app/answer.json`.
